case_title: HELENA MAY GAGNON VS. KELLISHA MAGEE

docket_entries.description: AUTO ACCIDENT CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF FOR $5,984.49 FILED BY GAGNON, HELENA MAY AS TO DEFENDANT MAGEE, KELLISHA ORDER SETTING TRIAL ISSUED FOR MAR-19-2018 AT 03:30 PM IN DEPT 506

REQUEST TO WAIVE COURT FEES AND COSTS PURSUANT TO G.C. 68633, CRC 3.51, 8.26, AND 8.818 (CONFIDENTIAL) FILED BY PLAINTIFF GAGNON, HELENA MAY ORDER FOR WAIVER OF COURT FEES AND COSTS GRANTED PURSUANT TO G.C. 68634 (E), CRC 3.52

THE COURT ORDERS DISMISSAL OF THE ENTIRE ACTION WITHOUT PREJUDICE. NO APPEARANCE BY PLAINTIFF OR DEFENDANT. NO PROOF OF SERVICE. NO EXHIBITS RETAINED. JUDGE: CECILIA P. CASTELLANOS; CLERK: G. FELICIANO; NOT REPORTED. 506

SMALL CLAIMS HEARING OF MAR-19-2018 - CONTINUED FOR PROOF OF SERVICE TO JUN-05-2018 AT 10:00 AM IN DEPT. 506 PLAINTIFF HELENA GAGNON IS PRESENT. DEFENDANT IS NOT PRESENT. NO PROOF OF SERVICE. NO EXHIBITS RETAINED. JUDGE: CECILIA P. CASTELLANOS; CLERK: G. FELICIANO; NOT REPORTED. 506
REMARK: RETURNED MAIL: SMALL CLAIMS ORDER OF DISMISSAL MAILED TO PLAINTIFF ON 6/5/18. PER U.S. POSTAL SERVICE, "RETURN TO SENDER - VACANT - UNABLE TO FORWARD."
REMARK:FILE DESTROYED PER ORDER SIGNED BY JUDGE SAMUEL FENG ON 2/16/2022 PURSUANT TO GOVERNMENT CODE SECTION 681.53.
